title: Docker-isolated mutation runner (MQTT-only, no host UDS socket)
description: Run kbs mutations from Docker with project mounted but no UDS socket sharing; set realtime transport to MQTT path and verify events emit to shared topic.
creator: ryan.porter

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text:
Progress: Provisioned MQTT API-token auth context for Docker mutation runner.
Evidence: Admin Cognito auth verified; created publish+subscribe token id=028887e067854771a0ab2a41c0618a13 for tenant anthus/kanbus.
Next: execute Docker-isolated kbs mutations with MQTT-only env and validate host consumer updates.
Risk/Blocker: none.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Progress: Docker-isolated MQTT mutation runner validated without host UDS linkage. Evidence: Container mutations created/updated/closed tskl-eo2.9.5 and updated tskl-eo2.9.6; host gossip watch captured matching issue.mutated events. Next: finalize host kbsc consumer validation and publish cross-Mac instructions. Risk/Blocker: none.
